name: Great Gorpies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Flour (white or half white-and half whole-wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Gradually add all of the handfuls of raisins, peanuts, and chocolate chips to the mixture.
3. Mix in the combined flour and baking soda.
4. Add milk.
5. Drop spoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes or until done.
7. Allow to cool on the cookie sheet for a minute or two before removing.
Handfuls are adult handfuls. If children are making this, they will need 2-3 handfuls. The ratio of handfuls can be adjusted; you may want to go heavier on the raisins and peanuts and lighter on the chocolate chips.
